Open source projects in this category

n8n

Node-based automation tool — self-host or cloud.

License: Sustainable Use License (source-available, free for self-host) Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Activepieces

Open source Zapier alternative with MIT license.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Huginn

Self-hosted "agents" that watch, scrape and act.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★☆☆
